title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: **Findings (by severity)** - `HIGH` Split contract in recent run artifacts: both schemas are present in “recent” outputs, which can break live verification scripts keyed to one name. Old key: [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v10-rerun-clean/delivery/variant-matrix.json) (`variants.nanobanana_manus`) New key: [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-live-failover-verify/delivery/variant-matrix.json) (`variants.nanobanana_adaptive`) Code now emits new key: [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L821](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L821) - `MEDIUM` Regression test gap: rename-critical fields are not asserted, so future drift can pass tests silently. Current tests validate status/selection only, not variant key names or variant directory naming: [test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L62](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L62), [test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L82](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L82) - `MEDIUM` Operator-facing docs are partially updated (path naming), but no explicit “legacy key mapping” is documented for old receipts. This is likely to confuse manual triage across mixed historical runs. New path docs: [SKILL.md#L89](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L89), [runtime-map.md#L81](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/references/runtime-map.md#L81) No explicit note about `nanobanana_manus -> nanobanana_adaptive` in the same docs. **No code edits made.**
